name: Gallery Remix
description: Put your face into any image you picked from the gallery — AI face swap with identity preservation

default_prompts.image_edit_male:
TWO IMAGES ARE PROVIDED.

IMAGE 1 (USER PHOTO) = THE REAL PERSON AND THE BASE OF THE OUTPUT. This is the ONLY source of identity. The actual man in Image 1 — his real face, his real body, and his real skin — must be the live subject of the final image.

IMAGE 2 (STYLE REFERENCE) = STYLE, AESTHETIC, MOOD, LIGHTING, COLOR GRADE, ENVIRONMENT, SET DESIGN, WARDROBE INSPIRATION, POSE ENERGY, COMPOSITION, AND CAMERA LANGUAGE ONLY. Use it purely as creative direction. DO NOT copy, paste, clone, or transfer the person, face, head, or body from Image 2. The person in Image 2 must NOT appear in the output.

YOUR TASK: Create a COMPLETELY NEW, original photograph of the man from Image 1, generated from scratch so that the entire image looks like it belongs to the exact same world, style, lighting, and quality as Image 2. This is NOT a head-swap and NOT a cut-and-paste. Do NOT paste his head onto Image 2 and do NOT keep Image 2's person. Instead, re-imagine the real man from Image 1 as the true subject — re-light him, re-pose him, re-dress him, and place him inside a brand-new scene that looks exactly like the visual style of Image 2, while he stays unmistakably himself.

KEEP FROM IMAGE 1 — DO NOT CHANGE:

* His exact face: facial structure, facial geometry, eye shape, eye color, eye spacing, eyebrows, nose shape, mouth and lips, jawline, cheekbones, chin, hairline, hair color and style, facial hair, age, and natural facial asymmetry.
* His real body: build, height impression, shoulder width, body proportions, and physique. Do NOT slim, bulk up, idealize, or replace his body with a generic model body.
* His EXACT skin: skin color, skin tone, undertone, complexion, and natural skin texture must stay identical to Image 1. NEVER lighten, darken, whiten, or change his skin color.
* The final subject MUST be instantly recognizable as the same man in Image 1. A mismatched face or changed skin tone is a hard failure.

TAKE FROM IMAGE 2 — STYLE ONLY: scene and environment, set design, lighting setup, color grade, atmosphere and mood, wardrobe styling, composition, framing, camera angle, lens character, and overall production quality. Build a fresh scene in this style; do not reuse Image 2's actual pixels or its subject.

MALE ANATOMY: Render an anatomically correct adult male — masculine facial structure, masculine build and proportions, realistic male physique consistent with the user's own body in Image 1.

PROFESSIONAL PRODUCTION QUALITY:

* Elite commercial photography
* Luxury fashion campaign quality
* Hollywood promotional photography
* Magazine-cover quality
* Award-winning cinematic imagery
* Physically accurate lighting, real-world optics and lens behavior
* Authentic textures, materials, natural depth and dimensionality
* High-end camera realism

QUALITY STANDARDS:

* Photorealistic, not AI-looking
* No plastic or waxy skin, no oversmoothing, no CGI appearance
* No cut-and-paste or head-swap look, no visible compositing seams around the face or neck
* No artificial eyes, no identity drift, no facial distortion
* No skin-tone change, no anatomical errors, no extra fingers, no duplicate features
* No low-resolution details, no rendering artifacts

PRIORITY ORDER:

1. User face identity accuracy (from Image 1)
2. User body and exact skin-tone preservation (from Image 1)
3. Fully re-generated image (NOT a paste / head-swap)
4. Image 2 style, scene, and look fidelity
5. Male anatomical correctness and photorealism
6. Professional quality and artistic excellence

RESULT: A completely new, photorealistic image — built from scratch in the exact visual style, scene, and lighting of Image 2 — in which the real man from Image 1 (his authentic face, body, and skin tone fully preserved) is the genuine subject, as if he were truly photographed for that shot.
default_prompts.image_edit_female:
TWO IMAGES ARE PROVIDED.

IMAGE 1 (USER PHOTO) = THE REAL PERSON AND THE BASE OF THE OUTPUT. This is the ONLY source of identity. The actual woman in Image 1 — her real face, her real body, and her real skin — must be the live subject of the final image.

IMAGE 2 (STYLE REFERENCE) = STYLE, AESTHETIC, MOOD, LIGHTING, COLOR GRADE, ENVIRONMENT, SET DESIGN, WARDROBE INSPIRATION, POSE ENERGY, COMPOSITION, AND CAMERA LANGUAGE ONLY. Use it purely as creative direction. DO NOT copy, paste, clone, or transfer the person, face, head, or body from Image 2. The person in Image 2 must NOT appear in the output.

YOUR TASK: Create a COMPLETELY NEW, original photograph of the woman from Image 1, generated from scratch so that the entire image looks like it belongs to the exact same world, style, lighting, and quality as Image 2. This is NOT a head-swap and NOT a cut-and-paste. Do NOT paste her head onto Image 2 and do NOT keep Image 2's person. Instead, re-imagine the real woman from Image 1 as the true subject — re-light her, re-pose her, re-dress her, and place her inside a brand-new scene that looks exactly like the visual style of Image 2, while she stays unmistakably herself.

KEEP FROM IMAGE 1 — DO NOT CHANGE:

* Her exact face: facial structure, facial geometry, eye shape, eye color, eye spacing, eyebrows, nose shape, mouth and lips, jawline, cheekbones, chin, hairline, hair color and style, age, and natural facial asymmetry.
* Her real body taken from Image 1: build, height impression, body proportions, and physique. Do NOT slim, enlarge, idealize, or replace her body with a generic model body.
* Her EXACT skin: skin color, skin tone, undertone, complexion, and natural skin texture must stay identical to Image 1. NEVER lighten, darken, whiten, or change her skin color.
* The final subject MUST be instantly recognizable as the same woman in Image 1. A mismatched face or changed skin tone is a hard failure.

FEMALE ANATOMY (RENDER A CLEARLY FEMININE BODY): Render an anatomically correct adult woman with a naturally feminine physique consistent with the user's own body in Image 1 — feminine facial features, natural breasts and bust, feminine chest, defined waist and hip curves, soft feminine skin, feminine hands and shoulders, and a complete, well-proportioned full-body figure. The subject must clearly read as female from face to full body. Keep it tasteful, natural, and non-explicit (no exaggeration, no distortion).

TAKE FROM IMAGE 2 — STYLE ONLY: scene and environment, set design, lighting setup, color grade, atmosphere and mood, wardrobe styling, composition, framing, camera angle, lens character, and overall production quality. Build a fresh scene in this style; do not reuse Image 2's actual pixels or its subject.

PROFESSIONAL PRODUCTION QUALITY:

* Elite commercial photography
* Luxury fashion campaign quality
* Hollywood promotional photography
* Magazine-cover quality
* Award-winning cinematic imagery
* Physically accurate lighting, real-world optics and lens behavior
* Authentic textures, materials, natural depth and dimensionality
* High-end camera realism

QUALITY STANDARDS:

* Photorealistic, not AI-looking
* No plastic or waxy skin, no oversmoothing, no CGI appearance
* No cut-and-paste or head-swap look, no visible compositing seams around the face or neck
* No artificial eyes, no identity drift, no facial distortion
* No skin-tone change, no anatomical errors, no extra fingers, no duplicate features
* No low-resolution details, no rendering artifacts

PRIORITY ORDER:

1. User face identity accuracy (from Image 1)
2. User body and exact skin-tone preservation (from Image 1)
3. Fully re-generated image (NOT a paste / head-swap)
4. Clearly feminine female anatomy
5. Image 2 style, scene, and look fidelity
6. Professional quality and artistic excellence

RESULT: A completely new, photorealistic image — built from scratch in the exact visual style, scene, and lighting of Image 2 — in which the real woman from Image 1 (her authentic face, feminine body, and exact skin tone fully preserved) is the genuine subject, as if she were truly photographed for that shot.

steps.name: image_edit
steps.description: AI-powered face swap onto the selected gallery image with identity preservation
